description:
本文译自Uusi kielemme的英文版原文。更多中文版译文刊登后，本网站将开设Uusi kielemme中文版专栏，敬请期待。

The articles on this page are Chinese translations of articles on the English version of Uusi kielemme. These pages currently are only listed here, but might get their own section later on when there are more of them!
